seoTitle: South Tamworth vs South Turramurra — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Tamworth and South Turramurra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Tamworth vs South Turramurra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Tamworth and South Turramurra.
heading: South Tamworth vs South Turramurra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Tamworth, New South Wales and South Turramurra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Turramurra has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to South Tamworth (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Tamworth or South Turramurra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Tamworth has a flood risk score of 53/100, while South Turramurra scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Tamworth scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. South Turramurra scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Tamworth or South Turramurra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Turramurra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
